scope.principle: Dify orchestrates chatflow/workflow. Dynamic product, price, stock, serial, warranty, ticket, and order state stays behind tools or external services.

templates.purpose: Public consumer support entrypoint with intent routing, metadata-filtered retrieval, business tool placeholders, citations, feedback prompt, safety branch, and low-confidence human handoff.

required_tools.name: support_context_lookup
required_tools.purpose: Fetch dynamic order, dealer, ticket, compatibility, serial, and customer context when available.

required_tools.name: human_handoff
required_tools.purpose: Escalate low-confidence or high-risk support requests.

templates.purpose: Collect shopper requirements and recommend 1-3 models using product retrieval plus mandatory price and inventory tool output.

required_tools.name: price_inventory_lookup
required_tools.purpose: Authoritative price, promotion, availability, and inventory source.

templates.purpose: Collect warranty intake, retrieve policy context, call authoritative warranty rules service, and route human review or ticket escalation.

required_tools.name: warranty_rules_check
required_tools.purpose: Authoritative precheck result for serial, evidence, coverage, exclusions, recall flags, and human review status.

required_tools.name: ticket_escalation
required_tools.purpose: Create warranty or service ticket after rules check or human review.

required_tools.name: human_review
required_tools.purpose: Warranty specialist and safety team review.

rules: Safety branch must not provide repair steps beyond immediate risk reduction and authorized service escalation.
Warranty eligibility must come from the warranty rules service, not from an LLM.
Compatibility, recall, serial, price, inventory, order, ticket, and appointment state must come from tools or external services.
Retrieved knowledge must be metadata-filtered by market, language, audience, status, and legal approval.
Consumer answers must include citations when using knowledge content.
Low-confidence, high-risk, or missing-evidence answers must route to human handoff and manual review.

p0_acceptance_points: One main consumer support chatflow exists and declares Start inputs.
Consumer support includes intent classification, metadata-filtered knowledge retrieval, business tool placeholders, low-confidence handoff, citations, safety branch, and feedback collection.
Sales workflow collects use case, budget, rider height, commute distance, terrain, and cargo need.
Sales workflow recommends 1-3 models and explicitly requires price and inventory from tools.
Warranty workflow collects model, model year, serial number, purchase proof, component, photos, region, and usage description.
Warranty workflow uses a rules service for precheck decisions and includes human review or ticket escalation.
Dynamic business API state for product, price, stock, serial, warranty, ticket, and order data stays behind tools or external services.
Every workflow YAML includes x_static_validation for parse-level and policy-level checks.
Manifest lists templates, modes, required datasets, tools, env vars, safety policies, and P0 acceptance points.
